refs.purpose: Run the cheap static workflow-test validation and workflow-label cross-check before Planemo execution.
refs.trigger: After authoring or editing a Galaxy workflow test file and before Planemo invocation.

refs.purpose: Runtime for workflow_test_init / workflow_test_on_invocation; install before authoring tests against a live invocation.
Revise workflow inputs, outputs, labels, checkpoints, and collection identifiers so meaningful tests can be authored.
refs.trigger: When test authoring reveals missing labels, omitted workflow-level outputs, unstable collection identifiers, weakly assertable final outputs, or fixture-shape pressure on workflow inputs.

refs.purpose: Flag assertion shortcuts that are acceptable in IWC versus shortcuts that should be avoided.
refs.trigger: When considering existence-only, size-only, image-only, checksum, output-label, or negative-test patterns.

refs.purpose: Assemble job input fixtures, remote URLs, hashes, collection shapes, and test-data layout in IWC style.
refs.trigger: When writing or revising the job/input side of a Galaxy workflow test file.

refs.purpose: Choose assertion families, tolerance magnitudes, and the static/Planemo validation loop.
refs.trigger: When writing or revising output assertions for a Galaxy workflow test file.

refs.purpose: Write tests with stable labels and artifacts that Planemo can connect back to Galaxy invocations, jobs, and outputs.
refs.trigger: When adding or revising workflow tests that will be iterated with Planemo or generated from existing invocations.

refs.purpose: Input contract: read the schema-valid Galaxy test plan (job inputs, expected outputs, assertion intent, tolerances, label assumptions, unresolved mappings, omissions) and convert it into tests-format output, reconciling assumed labels and fixtures against the real draft.
refs.verification: Consume a cast test plan from a *-test-to-galaxy-test-plan Mold and confirm tests-format output can be authored from it without re-reading the source summary.

refs.purpose: JSON Schema contract for the Galaxy workflow test format. Output of this Mold must validate against it.

produces.description: Galaxy workflow test file (tests-format) with job inputs, expected outputs, assertions; passes static schema + label cross-check. Named as the workflow basename + `-tests.yml` so Planemo discovers it as the companion of `galaxy-workflow.gxwf.yml`.

consumes.description: Schema-valid Galaxy test plan ([[galaxy-workflow-test-plan]]) from a *-test-to-galaxy-test-plan Mold; carries job inputs, expected outputs, assertion intent, fixture provenance, label assumptions, unresolved mappings, and omissions.

Concrete gxformat2 workflow being tested — the loop-endstate `galaxy-workflow.gxwf.yml` from [[advance-galaxy-draft-step]] (`class: GalaxyWorkflow`); provides the real input/output labels, outputs, and collection shapes the test must assert against.
Resolved test data references (URLs, paths, expected shapes) from paper-to-test-data or find-test-data.
